sub_modules.fp_fir_mac_comb: Combinational FIR multiply-accumulate over the current sample and zero-extended history using the 101 fixed band-pass coefficients.
sub_modules.fp32_mul_comb: Combinational binary32-style floating-point multiplier for simulation-oriented FIR arithmetic.
sub_modules.fp32_add_comb: Combinational binary32-style floating-point adder for simulation-oriented accumulation.
sub_modules.fp_coeff_rom_comb: Combinational coefficient ROM interface for the fixed band-pass tap words.
